questions.question: Describe the guiding principle of 'Continous Integration' in software development. How does it relate to the framework activity?
questions.hint: Focus on the core concept of Continuous Integration

questions.question: Explain the Agile framework's emphasis on 'Transparency'. How does this principle impact the framework activity?
questions.hint: Discuss the importance of visibility and communication in Agile

questions.question: What is the 'Feedback Loop' principle in the framework activity? Provide an example of how this principle guides the work of a team.
questions.hint: Use a real-world example or analogy to illustrate the concept
